dialogue_events.dialogue_text: I do not need to tell you what this means to Barsoom. It would take months to penetrate those mighty walls, in fact the work has already commenced, and there would be little to fear were the engine of the pumping plant to run as it should and as they all have for hundreds of years; but the worst, we fear, has happened. The instruments show a rapidly decreasing air pressure on all parts of Barsoom—the engine has stopped.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: The men of Helium have prided themselves that they have ever shown Barsoom how a nation of red men should live, now is our opportunity to show them how they should die. Let us go about our duties as though a thousand useful years still lay before us.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: We have been very happy, John Carter,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "We have been very happy, John Carter," she said, "and I thank whatever fate overtakes us that it permits us to die together."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

delivery_profile.delivery_note: warm delivery with warm voice quality, tender emotion, medium volume, and steady tempo.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: Let us bid each other farewell. The days of the greatness of Barsoom are over. Tomorrow's sun will look down upon a dead world which through all eternity must go swinging through the heavens peopled not even by memories. It is the end.

dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "Kiss me, John Carter," she murmured. "I love you! I love you! It is cruel that we must be torn apart who were just starting upon a life of love and happiness."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: It shall not be, my princess,
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "It shall not be, my princess," I cried. "There is, there must be some way, and John Carter, who has fought his way through a strange world for love of you, will find it."

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

delivery_profile.delivery_note: shouted delivery with forceful voice quality, tender emotion, high volume, and fast tempo.

dialogue_events.dialogue_text: If I can open these doors is there a man who can start the engines?
dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "If I can open these doors is there a man who can start the engines?" I asked.

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.

delivery_profile.delivery_note: asked delivery with inquiring voice quality, neutral emotion, medium volume, and steady tempo.

delivery_source.dialogue_text: If I can open these doors is there a man who can start the engines?
delivery_source.source_excerpt: "If I can open these doors is there a man who can start the engines?" I asked.

dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "I can," he replied, "if you open quickly. I can last but a few moments more. But it is useless, they are both dead and no one else upon Barsoom knew the secret of these awful locks. For three days men crazed with fear have surged about...

dialogue_events.source_excerpt: "After it," I cried to my companion, "and if you reach the pump room turn loose all the pumps. It is the only chance Barsoom has to exist tomorrow!"

speaker.notes: First-person narration suggests John Carter as the speaker.
